summary: Frontend testing of NASSAQ iteration 51 features: Command Center UI improvements, wizard dialog fixes, and impersonation mode enhancements. All 7 requested features verified and working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested UI improvements verified. Command Center has icon-only refresh button, no sessions/notification buttons, 'عرض الجدول' button present. Wizards open and close properly. Impersonation mode shows orange banner with 'العودة للمنصة' button. Sidebar shows 'الجدول المدرسي' instead of 'الجدول الدراسي'.

refresh_button_icon_only.evidence: Refresh button found with data-testid='refresh-dashboard-btn', inner text is empty (icon only)

sessions_button_removed.evidence: Quick actions area contains only: طالب, معلم, فصل, عرض الجدول - no sessions button

notification_button_removed.evidence: Quick actions area does not contain notification/إشعار button

view_schedule_button.evidence: 'عرض الجدول' button present in quick actions with data-testid='quick-action-view-schedule'

add_teacher_wizard_close.evidence: Add Teacher Wizard opens on button click and closes properly when Cancel button clicked

create_class_wizard_close.evidence: Create Class Wizard opens on button click and closes properly when Cancel button clicked

impersonation_banner.evidence: Orange impersonation banner visible at top with 'أنت الآن تعاين مدرسة:' text and school name

back_to_platform_button.evidence: 'العودة للمنصة' button present in impersonation banner with data-testid='exit-impersonation-btn'

sidebar_school_schedule.evidence: Sidebar contains 'الجدول المدرسي' (School Schedule) instead of 'الجدول الدراسي'

test_execution_details.test_1_refresh_button: Verified refresh button is icon-only (no text) with data-testid='refresh-dashboard-btn'
test_execution_details.test_3_quick_actions: Verified quick actions contain: طالب, معلم, فصل, عرض الجدول - no sessions or notification buttons
test_execution_details.test_4_add_teacher_wizard: Opened wizard via quick action button, closed via Cancel button - works correctly
test_execution_details.test_5_create_class_wizard: Opened wizard via quick action button, closed via Cancel button - works correctly
test_execution_details.test_6_impersonation_banner: Logged in as admin, clicked 'فتح لوحة التحكم' on school card, verified orange banner appears
test_execution_details.test_7_exit_impersonation: Clicked 'العودة للمنصة' button, verified return to admin area and banner removal
